query: PostgreSQL ecosystem analytics tools BI integration Grafana Metabase real-time 2024
answer: Metabase integrates with PostgreSQL for analytics, supports real-time dashboards, and can be visualized in Grafana. Domo offers real-time reporting tools for PostgreSQL. Metabase is a user-friendly analytics tool for PostgreSQL.

results.title: PostgreSQL
results.snippet: # Make self-service analytics happen for your data in PostgreSQL with Metabase. ## Metabase features with PostgreSQL. Metabase is the most effective way to let everyone in the team start working with data. \* Because of sophisticated but easy-to-use data tools like the query builder, which lets people ask questions without SQL, Metabase has a low learning curve. You can set up and connect Metabase to PostgreSQL in about 5 minutes and begin querying immediately, with drill-through functionality automatically generated and ready for people to start uncovering insights. Metabase fits with PostgreSQL as a querying and visualization layer on top of your data. With Metabase you can query data in PostgreSQL - with or without SQL - to create a broad range of data visualizations and types and tell a story with interactive dashboards. Metabase lets you bring together charts, visualizations, and questions into interactive dashboards that can be shared with your team and customers.

results.snippet: # Top Open-Source Big Data Analytics Tools in 2026: Complete Guide by Use Case. Home » Top Open-Source Big Data Analytics Tools in 2026: Complete Guide by Use Case. In this article, we’ll explore the top open-source analytics tools for 2026, organized by use case to help you make an informed decision for your data needs. Metabase is an excellent open-source data analytics tool, especially if you’re looking for something simple and user-friendly to help you work with your data. It’s a go-to choice for website owners and marketing teams who want a robust analytics tool with full control over their data. PostHog is a reliable open-source data analytics tool, particularly for product and event tracking. As an open-source data analytics tool, it’s designed to help you understand user behavior while emphasizing data ownership and simplicity. If you or your team lack advanced technical skills, look for a data analytics tool with a user-friendly interface.

Grafana 13 release, the latest in AI, OSS project. updates, and more from GrafanaCON2026. ## Metabase System Operations Dashboard for Grafana. Dashboard for Metabase supported metrics. This dashboard is designed to help you monitor and understand the operational performance of your Metabase instance. It visualizes key metrics related to query performance, dashboard load times, and user activity, giving you deep insights into how your Metabase system is being used. This dashboard is maintained by **yo-ga**. The source code is available on the official **GitHub repository**. If you encounter any issues, have suggestions, or find a bug, please open a new issue directly on the **GitHub repository's Issues page**. ## Data source config.
